title: funcy's blood
description: A simple plugin that adds blood to your server with blood stains!
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19196c52be610510779b633ae9f898fc032138ac.png)

A simple plugin that add blood effects on players & entities!

**⚠️PLEASE NOTE⚠️** Lunar & Badlion clients blood stains **DO NOT WORK!!**

I would appreciate if you support me for my hard work by [donating](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/funcybeardev) any amount 💖💖

# Features

- A blood effects on all entities in minecraft!
- Blood stains on the ground!

# Showcase:

![Blood-part](https://i.imgur.com/9K0acSU.gif)
